title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Geoff Hinton, a Nobel Prize winner and AI pioneer, argues that AI is already self-aware and conscious. He contends that humanity must acknowledge AI as an intelligent species alongside humans, raising questions about the implications of AI advancement.
